SimulationRecord.title: Simulation Record
SimulationRecord.description: A record of a solar simulation run.

userId.description: The ID of the user who ran the simulation.

modelType.description: The type of model used (DIODE, TEMPERATURE, PR, LIU_JORDAN).

inputs.description: The input parameters for the simulation.

results.description: The calculated results of the simulation.

metadata.description: Additional metadata like location or description.
